overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage walking through an ancient Greek city with stone temples, decorative banners, and market stalls. The scene features a festive atmosphere with purple carpets and hanging decorations, populated by NPCs in period clothing.

scene_state.functional_zone: open stone plaza with scattered flower petals and ceremonial banners

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the stone plaza toward the distant temple complex

notable_agents.action: group of citizens in ancient Greek attire standing and conversing near the path

entered.detail: tall stone poles with red fabric banners flanking the entrance path
large stone temple with ionic columns visible in the distance
large stone urns with flames burning atop them
red and pink flower petals scattered across the stone pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide stone plaza bathed in bright sunlight, with tall red banners flanking a path scattered with flower petals. The camera moves forward toward a distant temple complex while NPCs in period clothing stand conversing ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: market area with decorated cart and mountain backdrop

events.description: camera turns left revealing a market stall with red canopy and mountain backdrop
entering decorated corridor with hanging purple banners and ceremonial carpet

agents.ego_description: turning left to pass by the market stall while observing the mountain scenery and temple architecture

notable_agents.action: vendor standing beside the market cart decorated with purple and yellow garlands

entered.detail: wooden market cart with red fabric canopy and decorative flower garlands
rocky mountain cliff visible behind the market area
strings of purple and black decorative banners suspended between columns
long purple ceremonial carpet with gold trim laid down the center of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left to reveal a decorated market cart with a red canopy, set against a backdrop of rocky mountains. The path transitions to a ceremonial corridor with purple carpets and hanging banners strung between stone columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial corridor with hanging purple banners and carpet

events.description: passing under decorative hanging banners that create dappled shadows on the purple carpet

agents.ego_description: walking down the decorated corridor beneath hanging banners, approaching the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: citizen in yellow robe walking in the opposite direction through the corridor

entered.detail: tall stone walls with decorative white lattice railings lining the corridor
stone seating benches placed along the right wall of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds through a narrow ceremonial corridor defined by stone walls and benches, with purple carpets running down the center and decorative banners hanging overhead. The lighting becomes slightly diffused by the overhead decorations as the path continues toward the temple.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance with massive stone columns and stairs

events.description: approaching the large temple portico with tall ionic columns and decorative pediment
ascending the temple steps and passing between the massive columns into the entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the grand temple entrance, observing the architectural details and statues

notable_agents.action: robed figure in orange garments walking toward the temple entrance

entered.detail: grand temple entrance with triangular pediment and ornate stone carvings
tall fluted stone columns supporting the temple portico roof
wide stone steps with purple carpet runners leading up to the entrance
stone statues flanking the temple entrance staircase

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens to reveal a magnificent temple portico with massive ionic columns and a wide staircase. The camera approaches the entrance, passing decorative statues and ascending the steps while other robed figures move about the plaza. The interior courtyard becomes visible through the columned entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sun-drenched open plaza into the shaded grandeur of a temple portico. It begins by gliding across a wide stone plaza scattered with flower petals and flanked by tall red banners, moving toward a distant temple complex. As the camera turns left to pass a red-canopied market cart set against rocky mountains, the open space transitions into a ceremonial corridor lined with stone columns and purple carpets. The scene then narrows through a corridor of stone walls and benches where the sunlight becomes diffused by overhead decorations before finally opening up to a magnificent temple portico. The camera concludes its journey by ascending a wide staircase past decorative statues and robed figures, moving through massive ionic columns toward the interior courtyard.
